spellcasting.description: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability:

actions.name: Mace
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Radiant Flame
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +4, range 60 ft. Hit: 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Spellcasting
actions.description: The priest casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability: At Will: Light, Thaumaturgy

bonus_actions.name: Divine Aid (1/Day)
bonus_actions.description: The priest casts Bless, Healing Word, or Sanctuary, using the same spellcasting ability as Spellcasting.

tactical_info.environment: Temples, shrines, religious communities, pilgrimage sites
tactical_info.tactics: Uses radiant flame for ranged attacks, divine aid for healing support, mace for close combat with radiant damage
tactical_info.weaknesses: Very low HP and AC, limited spellcasting, vulnerable to sustained combat
